case_title: SIEGEL, STANLEY O. vs. DALY, JOHN DANIEL et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT DALY, JOHN DANIEL

JACK FENDELL, JUDGE PRO-TEM, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ARNOLD EVJE II FOR PLTF. DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, TERMS NOT ON THE RECORD, BUT JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COURT AND SIGNED BY DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DALY, JOHN DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1724 WALLER STREET, #C $1,824.77 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,824.77, STAYED UNTIL NOV-08-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
